summary: This is a brief announcement post where Joel congratulates former intern Ben Kamens on graduating and promotes his upcoming cross-country bicycle trip for charity. Joel mentions that Kamens has built a text-message-map-gateway to track the trip's progress. The post is essentially a personal shout-out rather than a substantive essay.
key_points: Joel highlights the career pipeline from intern to future employee at Fog Creek
Ben Kamens built a technical solution (text-message-map tracking) for a non-technical endeavor
The post illustrates Joel's practice of using his popular blog to boost his employees' personal projects
money_quotes: He's rigged up some kind of text-message-map-gateway thingamajig so you can track their progress.
key_insight: A short personal announcement with no substantive technical or business content, reflecting Joel's habit of using his blog platform to support his team's endeavors.
